instruction: Classify the customer's banking message into exactly one intent label.
baseline_prompt: You are a banking assistant. Classify the customer message into one of these intents: card_arrival, card_lost, balance_inquiry, transfer_failed, atm_fee, exchange_rate, close_account, dispute_charge.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench; intent label space inspired by banking77 (CC-BY-4.0).

train.query: How many more days until my new card arrives?
My card was stolen at the train station this morning.
Can you tell me how much money I currently have?
I tried to send money to my landlord but it didn't go through.
Why was I charged a fee for using the cash machine abroad?
What rate do you use when I pay in euros?
I want to permanently shut down my account.
There is a $90 charge I never made — please remove it.
It's been two weeks and the card still hasn't shown up.
I think I dropped my debit card somewhere downtown.
Show me my available funds, please.
The payment to my friend keeps failing.
I got billed extra at an ATM that isn't yours.
How are foreign currency conversions priced?
Please close my checking account for good.

test.query: There's a transaction on my statement I don't recognize and want reversed.
When will the replacement card get to my house?
Someone took my wallet with the card inside.
My wire transfer was rejected — what happened?
I was surprised by a withdrawal fee on my last cash machine visit.
Which exchange rate applies to my purchases in London?
Cancel my account entirely, I'm switching banks.
Dispute this charge — I did not authorize the $42 payment.
Has my card been mailed yet?
I can't find my card anywhere, I think it's gone.
Could you check the amount left in my savings?
The transfer to my own other account didn't complete.
Why is there a surcharge from the ATM operator?
Tell me today's conversion rate for dollars to yen.
